name: Chocolate Fruit Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped dried apricots, raisins, and sultanas with the grated orange rind and 60 grams of grated dark chocolate in a small bowl.
2. Roll teaspoons of this mixture into balls and refrigerate overnight.
3. Break the remaining 120 grams of dark chocolate into pieces. Place the pieces at the top of a double saucepan set over simmering water, or melt them in a microwave for 2 minutes on HIGH.
4. Stir until smooth, then dip each fruit ball into the chocolate until it is evenly coated.
5. Place the balls on foil-covered trays and allow them to set in a cool place.
6. Once set, store the balls in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Makes about 25.
